change_notes.p3-c001: Postgres-only divergence documented in README.md, CLAUDE.md, docs/STORAGE.md
change_notes.p3-c002: Low-effort parity fixes: unimplemented!/todo! panics replaced, did:web enabled, 2MB blob limit, getBlob Content-Disposition: attachment, tools.ozone.* proxy
change_notes.p3-c003: Refresh token replay defense: migration, schema, helpers, replay check + JTI insert in rotate_refresh_token
change_notes.p3-c004: Sequencer race fix via pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext(did)); recovery hardening skips corrupt event bytes
change_notes.p3-c005: Lexicon refresh against upstream 877e629: actor pronouns/VerificationState/StatusView/LiveEventPreferences, feed postgate+threadgate+FeedViewerState, graph FeedList/Relationship, sync ListReposByCollection, moderation CreateReport. UPSTREAM_VERSION.md + README refresh procedure added. Committed 9cd28fc.
change_notes.p3-c006: Sync v1.1: SyncEvt.commit field added to sequencer events + SubscribeReposSync lexicon struct
change_notes.p3-c007: Actor store RLS: permissive policies on 6 per-actor tables (non-breaking; tighten once SET LOCAL wired)
change_notes.p3-c008: Federation conformance harness in tests/conformance/ (docker-compose + shell driver + Dockerfile)
change_notes.p3-c009: OAuth endpoints wired: metadata, jwks, par, authorize, token, revoke, introspect — structured errors not panics
change_notes.p3-c010: rsky-oauth-scopes crate: OAuthScope, ScopeSet, scope_permits_xrpc, known constants — in workspace
change_notes.p3-c011: OAuth schema migration: oauth_client, oauth_device, oauth_authorized_client, oauth_token, oauth_par_request
change_notes.p3-c012: Full OAuth wiring: try_extract_oauth_scope() discriminator in auth_verifier, oauth_scope field on Credentials, scope_permits_xrpc gate in pipethrough, requestCrawl concurrent coalesce in crawlers.rs. Committed 3d786ba.

deployment_notes: ArgoCD removed. Unified deploy.yml (conduit pattern) replaces ArgoCD + 6 standalone build workflows.
did_subsystem_notes: All 4 phases complete (2026-04-28). Phase 1: async trait + CompositeDidResolver + ATProto profile validator (2f5a39a). Phase 2: did:key + did:peer offline resolvers + with_all_methods builder (ff604f3). Phase 3: AgentAuth Rocket guard + verify_agent_service_jwt in rsky-pds (6cbed43). Phase 4: didMethodsSupported in describeServer + OAuth server metadata (c1555a7). Integration (f1be504): SharedCompositeResolver managed state — zero per-request resolver allocation. All workspace crates compile clean.
did_subsystem_integration_notes: SharedCompositeResolver { resolver: CompositeDidResolver } added to rsky-pds managed state (lib.rs build_rocket). verify_agent_service_jwt accepts &CompositeDidResolver instead of plc_url string; AgentAuth::from_request extracts &State<SharedCompositeResolver>. Eliminates per-request with_all_methods() allocation.
notes: Phase reflected 2026-05-01. 15/17 goals MET, 2 PARTIAL (sync v1.1 live verification pending, RLS permissive-only). Recommended phase-4 focus: DPoP binding, RLS tighten, CI conformance harness, dedicated OAuth key pair, background jobs sweep.
